@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent identified 'food' domain papers by checking if 'food' appears in the filename (execute_python using filenames from paper_docs_database) and summed citations from the grouped Citations query, rather than extracting/using the actual domain information from the paper texts, leading to an incomplete set and an undercount.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent aggregated citations correctly and loaded all paper documents, but its execute_python step used an overly restrictive regex (only lines starting with "domain:" or "domains:" and only within the first 4000 characters, falling back to title keywords) to identify 'food' domain papers, yielding zero matches and thus summing to 0 instead of the true total.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
